title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Cyient Capital India

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Cyient Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Cyient Capital India in Howrah offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cyient Capital India:
Cyient Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cyient Capital India!
